name: Laptop
description: Reliable laptop for students and professionals, suitable for coding, browsing, and daily work. Offers smooth performance, decent battery backup, and a comfortable keyboard for long usage.

name: Smartphone
description: Feature-rich smartphone with a clear display, good battery life, and a capable camera. Ideal for everyday use, social media, and entertainment.

name: Headphones
description: Wireless headphones with active noise cancellation and balanced sound output. Designed for music, calls, and long listening sessions without discomfort.

name: Smart Watch
description: Smartwatch with fitness tracking, heart rate monitoring, and call notifications. Helps you stay active and connected throughout the day.

name: Tablet
description: Slim and lightweight tablet perfect for watching videos, reading, and casual gaming. Offers smooth touch response and a vibrant display.

name: Keyboard
description: Durable mechanical keyboard with tactile keys and solid build quality. Suitable for typing, programming, and gaming setups.

name: Mouse
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with smooth tracking and responsive clicks. Comfortable for long work sessions and everyday use.

name: Bluetooth Speaker
description: Compact Bluetooth speaker with strong bass and clear sound output. Easy to carry and perfect for indoor or outdoor music.

name: Gaming Monitor
description: High refresh rate monitor with sharp visuals and low response time. Ideal for gaming, streaming, and multimedia tasks.

name: External Hard Drive
description: Portable 1TB external hard drive for storing files, backups, and media. Offers reliable performance and easy plug-and-play usage.
